series_metadata.series_title: Written Contracts for goods or services and Competitive Bids
series_metadata.series_description: Written contracts for goods, services, grants, sub-grants, temporary personnel, purchase orders and all related documentation including requests for proposals, competitive bids, responses, evaluations, clarifications, awards, protest, change orders, amendments and performance bond documents.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: written contracts and related RFP documents terminating prior June 16, 2021, contract termination ; Electronic: or written contracts and related RFP documents which terminated prior June 16, 2021, contract termination
